title: getValue()
text: getValue() Returns the text of the specified label. Return = LabelObject .getValue() Arguments None Return Value Return Value of the field label represented by the uniface.Label object. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Example: Getting the Text of a Label A Label object can be obtained from an occurrence or from a field, so the following statements are equivalent. Explain this code vText = this.getEntity("ENT1").getOccurrence(0).getField("NAME").getLabel().getValue(); vText = this.getEntity("ENT1").getOccurrence(0).getLabel("NAME").getValue(); Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid.
